LAW AND MOTION 302, NO APPEARANCE ON THIS MATTER. RULING: THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING. PLAINTIFF AMERICAN EXPRESS CENTURION BANK'S MOTION TO ENTER JUDGMENT IS GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION FILED. MS. PERKINS DEFAULTED ON THE SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT. (BROWN DECL., 4.) PLAINTIFF SENT A NOTICE OF DEFAULT, AND PLAINTIFF DID NOT CURE. (BROWN DECL. 4, EXHIBIT B.) PLAINTIFF ACKNOWLEDGES CREDITS OF $ 3,281.00. JUDGMENT IS ISSUED IN THE AMOUNT OF $ 6,582.17 PURSUANT TO THE TERMS OF THE SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGMENT SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: MARLA J. MILLER, CLERK: LESLEY FISCELLA, REPORTER: ANTHONY VAUGHN #6185.
ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT ISSUED TO PLAINTIFF AMERICAN EXPRESS CENTURION BANK

calendar.matters:
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Sep-29-2014 Off Calendar

Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn To Enter Judgment
Off Calendar Jun-12-2013 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: No appearance on this matter. RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling. PLAINTIFF AMERICAN EXPRESS CENTURION BANK's motion To Enter Judgment is Granted. No opposition filed. Ms. Perkins defaulted on the Settlement Agreement. (Brown Decl., 4.) Plaintiff sent a Notice of Default, and Plaintiff did not cure. (Brown Decl. 4, Exhibit B.) Plaintiff acknowledges credits of $ 3,281.00. Judgment is issued in the amount of $ 6,582.17 pursuant to the terms of the Settlement Agreement. Order signed in open court. judgment signed in open court. Judge: Marla J. Miller, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Reporter: Anthony Vaughn #6185.
